ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "collection" TEXT /* Collection the document belongs to */,
  "doc_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created or published */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "topic_score" REAL /* Topic score of the document */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the document */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the document */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the document */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the document is sensitive */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract or summary of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_collection FOREIGN KEY ("collection") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the collection was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the collection was last updated */,
  "managed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who manages the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_managed_by FOREIGN KEY ("managed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent topic (for hierarchical structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_parent_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the keyword is associated with */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with the document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the document was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_access_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_access_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)
